gold.title: Glitchy 404 1
gold.reason: Glitch-effect 404 page — visually striking and memorable, immediately elevates brand perception on error pages.

gold.title: ghost 404 page
gold.reason: Ghost-themed 404 with creative illustration approach — polished and delightful for marketing-quality error pages.

gold.title: Not Found Page 1
gold.reason: Full not-found page with polished layout — production-ready 404 that enhances overall site quality.

silver.title: Not Found Page 2
silver.reason: Second not-found page variant — good quality alternative but similar in function to sibling component.

silver.title: 404 Page Not Found
silver.reason: Clean 404 page layout — solid and reusable for most websites.

silver.title: Empty State Beautiful Accessible No Data States
silver.reason: Accessible empty state with good styling — useful for data tables and content sections.

silver.title: Empty Testimonial
silver.reason: Empty testimonial placeholder — useful for CMS-driven marketing pages when no content exists yet.

bronze.title: Empty
bronze.reason: Generic empty state with minimal styling — too basic for marketing site use.

bronze.title: Combobox
bronze.reason: Combobox misclassified in empty-states — not an empty state component.
